shorts.title: Sheriff calls for overtime theft investigation in Lackawanna County
shorts.title_distilled: Sheriff calls for overtime theft investigation in Lackawanna County.
shorts.description: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Lackawanna County Sheriff Mark McAndrew is calling on the district attorney's office to open an investigation into two deputies who he says are suspected of receiving tens of thousands of dollars in unauthorized overtime. In the letter to Lackawanna County District Attorney Brian Gallagher, McAndrew alleges that the deputies "knowingly received [...]
